insertedTextBackground.$description: Background color for text that got inserted

removedTextBackground.$description: Background color for text that got removed

border.$description: Border color between the two text editors

insertedLineBackground.$description: Background color for lines that got inserted

removedLineBackground.$description: Background color for lines that got removed

insertedForeground.$description: Diff overview ruler foreground for inserted content

removedForeground.$description: Diff overview ruler foreground for removed content
